rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a careful copy-edit pass, removing duplicates and tightening prose effectively.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was disclosed for some assumptions but not consistently across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed within the agreed scope without any drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; changes were constructive.
rationale.RX.5: Changes were listed but lacked detailed annotations for each edit.
